title: Mastercook Stainless Steel Induction Milk Pot 1.2L - 12cm / 1.8L - 14cm Stainless Steel Milk Pan With Pouring Lip (1.2 Litre - 12cm)
features: A stainless steel milk pot with a stay cook bakerlite handle and pouring lip to meet your everyday cooking needs. This mirror polished stainless steel milk pot is designed with an induction base which provides an efficient heat distribution system for you to evenly warm up or boil milk/tea/coffee/soup even at lower temperatures. It is milk pan built for you to comfortably cook!

This Mastercook Stainless Steel Milk Pot available in 2 different sizes - 12cm (1.2 Litre) and 14cm (1.8 Litre). Note - ONLY 1 MILK POT in your chosen size shall be sent out. Care Instructions - This milk pan IS ONLY SUITABLE FOR Gas, Electric, Ceramic, Halogen & Induction Hobs.

Benefits Of An Induction Base – You can now quickly and evenly warm up liquid content such as milk or even a can of soup as this pot will heat up in minutes due to the induction base. Heat will be directly generated & evenly distributed throughout the milk pot, therefore less steps & time involved in heating up the pot. Even at lower temperatures, this pot will provide better performance as the induction base will provide more precise control of heat, hence you will easily be able to cook at l

Preserve Flavours - Properties of stainless steel make it one of the best materials for kitchenware, as it is most used materials in kitchens all around the world. Stainless steel kitchenware does not filtrate any of its metallic properties and therefore, this milk pot will not affect liquid content or impact the quality of flavour. Also while cooking it will guarantee fast even heat distribution and eliminate hot spots.

Ergonomic Features – The milk pot has a stay cook bakerlite handle so that you can safely pick up the pot while protecting your hands & fingers and do not get them burnt. There is also easy pouring lip to allow easy pouring of content.
